trait.name: Barbed Hide
entries: At the start of each of its turns, the barbed devil deals 5 (1d10) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three melee attacks: one with its tail and two with its claws.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
